title: carlina kurdica
intro: Carlina kurdica, also known as Kurdish carline thistle or Kurdish carline, is a plant species in the sunflower family with its native habitat in the mountains of Kurdistan, a region spanning across Turkey and Iraq. The medicinal properties of Carlina kurdica include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, which can be particularly beneficial in treating respiratory and digestive problems. Carlina kurdica can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
